label: BSC read-only query
description: Read chain state via your BSC RPC from Settings (no transaction, no wallet unlock for password-protected keys). Includes chain RPC info (chain ID, block, fee hints), block header by tag, address nonce, transaction receipt / pending lookup, PancakeSwap MasterChef farm pending CAKE, userInfo, poolInfo, poolLength, Pancake V2/V3 reads, V3 QuoterV2 quotes, Pancake V3 NPM position read (tick-based concentrated liquidity NFT), PancakeSwap Infinity Liquidity Book (bin pool id, slot0, per-bin reserves/shares, user position share, Bin NPM NFT read, BinQuoter exact in single-pool and multi-hop path quotes), Infinity farm campaign list (mainnet), V2 router quotes, ERC20 metadata and total supply, balances, allowance, pair reserves. Saves JSON to a row variable.

options.label: automationWalletAddress (saved Settings address)
nativeBalance (BNB wei; optional address else automation wallet)
erc20Balance (token + optional holder)
allowance (token, spender; optional owner)
pairReserves (V2 pair address)
routerAmountsOut (V2 quote: amountIn + path → amounts[])
routerAmountsIn (V2 quote: amountOut + path → amounts[])
erc20Metadata (decimals, symbol, name)
erc20TotalSupply (token; also V2 LP pair address)
blockByTag (optional blockTag; default latest)
rpcInfo (chainId, latestBlock, gasPrice / EIP-1559 fields)
transactionCount (nonce; optional address else automation wallet)
transactionReceipt (mined receipt or pending tx by hash)
farmPendingCake (MasterChef pending CAKE; pid + optional address)
farmUserInfo (MasterChef staked amount + rewardDebt; pid + optional address)
farmPoolInfo (MasterChef poolInfo: LP token + alloc; pid only)
farmPoolLength (MasterChef number of pools; optional MC override)
v2FactoryGetPair (Pancake V2 factory getPair; tokenA + tokenB)
v3PoolState (Pancake V3 pool: slot0 + liquidity + tokens)
v3FactoryGetPool (Pancake V3 factory; tokenA + tokenB + v3Fee)
v3QuoterExactInputSingle (V3 QuoterV2; tokenIn, tokenOut, v3Fee, amountIn)
v3QuoterExactOutputSingle (V3 QuoterV2; tokenIn, tokenOut, v3Fee, amountOut)
v3QuoterExactInput (multi-hop: v3Path + amountIn)
v3QuoterExactOutput (multi-hop: v3Path forward + amountOut)
v3NpmPosition (Pancake V3 NPM positions(tokenId) + ownerOf; tick-based LP NFT)
infiBinPoolId (Infinity Bin poolId from tokenA/B + infinityFee + binStep + optional hooks)
infiDecodeBinParameters (decode pool parameters bytes32 → binStep + hooksRegistration)
infiBinPoolKeyFromId (poolId → on-chain PoolKey tuple)
infiBinSlot0 (activeId, protocolFee, lpFee for poolId)
infiBinGetBin (reserves + liquidity + shares for one bin)
infiBinGetBinsRange (batch up to 64 bins; binIdLower..binIdUpper)
infiBinGetPosition (user share in bin; poolId + owner + binId + optional positionSalt)
infiBinNextNonEmptyBin (next non-empty bin; swapForY + binId)
infiBinNpmPosition (Infinity BinPositionManager positions(tokenId) + ownerOf)
infiBinQuoteExactInputSingle (Infinity BinQuoter; exact in → amountOut + gasEstimate)
infiBinQuoteExactInput (Infinity BinQuoter; multi-hop path JSON + exact in → amountOut)
infiBinQuoteExactOutput (Infinity BinQuoter; multi-hop path JSON + exact out → amountIn)
infiBinQuoteExactOutputSingle (Infinity BinQuoter; exact out → amountIn + gasEstimate)
infiFarmCampaignLength (Infinity farm campaign count; BSC mainnet only)
infiFarmCampaignInfo (campaignId → poolId, reward token, …)
isContract (address has bytecode?)

formSchema.label: Holder (erc20Balance; routerAmountsOut / V3 exact-in quotes when amountIn is max/balance)
amountIn (V2/V3 exact-in quotes; uint256 or max/balance)
Router override (optional; must be pinned V2 router if set)
Factory override (v2FactoryGetPair; optional; must be pinned V2 factory if set)
v3Pool (v3PoolState — pool contract address)
formSchema.placeholder: Paste pool address or search by token pair

formSchema.label: Factory V3 override (optional; must be pinned Pancake V3 factory if set)
v3Fee (V3 factory / Quoter — uint24 tier, e.g. 100, 500, 2500, 10000)
QuoterV2 override (optional; must be pinned Pancake V3 QuoterV2 if set)
MasterChef override (farm reads; optional; pinned v1/v2 only)
v3Path (multi-hop Quoter: token,fee,token,fee,…,token — forward swap order)
v3PositionTokenId (v3NpmPosition — NPM NFT id, uint256 string)
Position manager V3 override (optional; pinned Pancake NPM only, same as bscPancake)
blockTag (blockByTag: latest, pending, hex, or decimal; optional)
BinPoolManager override (optional; must match pinned Infinity address)
infinityFee (uint24 LP fee tier — Infinity bin pool id / add-remove)
infinityHooksRegistrationJson (optional JSON object for pool key)
positionSalt (bytes32 hex for getPosition; optional = zero)
campaignManagerAddress override (optional; pinned mainnet if empty)
infiQuoteExactAmount (uint128 — single-pool or multi-hop: exact in OR exact out per operation)
BinQuoter override (optional; must match pinned Infinity address)
